debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i : Fin n
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i i) ν (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

failed_attempts: simp [wignerMeasureDist]

rw [WignerMeasure]
  have h_eq : (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i i) = (fun ω => ω ⟨(i, i), le_refl i⟩) := by
    ext ω
    simp [wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction]
  rw [h_eq]
  have h_dist : wignerMeasureDist μ ν n ⟨(i, i), le_refl i⟩ = ν := by
    simp [wignerMeasureDist]
  rw [← h_dist]
  exact MeasureTheory.Measure.map_eval_pi (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(i, i), le_refl i⟩

    exact Measure.map_eval_pi (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n) ⟨(i, i), le_refl i⟩
